🔔 Smart Reminders & Events

Smart Reminders.
Real Care.

Memora is a smart reminders and events system with AI voice assistance, real-time monitoring for loved ones, and emergency tools built in. It can also serve as a supportive aid in the very early stages of memory difficulties.

🟢 Get on Google Play Learn More →
30×Reminder retries per task
6Languages supported
5Emergency contacts
100%Background operation
CAPABILITIES

Everything Your Loved One Needs

Designed for elderly users and their families — simple, reliable, and always on.

🔔

Smart Voice Reminders

Personalized voice alerts repeat up to 30 times, every 40 seconds, until the task is marked done — even with screen off or app closed.

🤖

AI Voice Assistant

Tapping any notification opens a voice AI that talks to your loved one, confirms task completion, and notifies family if needed.

👨‍👩‍👧

Real-Time Family Monitoring

Family members see task status live, get alerts for missed tasks, and can remotely add or manage tasks. Note: completion is self-reported and may not always reflect what was actually done.

📊

Detailed Performance Reports

Weekly and monthly reports on completed tasks, average response times, and trends — shareable with family.

📍

Emergency Location Sharing

One tap sends your loved one's exact GPS location to all emergency contacts instantly.

📞

Quick Emergency Dialing

Instant access to call 5 emergency contacts — regular call or WhatsApp video — directly from the app.

🌐

6 Language Support

Full interface and voice in Hebrew, Arabic, Russian, English, French and Spanish.

🔒

Simple & Secure

Clean interface designed for elderly users, with PIN protection and Firebase-backed secure data storage.

TRANSPARENCY

Why We Need These Permissions

Every permission has a clear purpose. We only request what is strictly required for the app to work as intended.

🔔

POST_NOTIFICATIONS

Required to deliver reminders to your loved one.

⚙️

FOREGROUND_SERVICE

Required for continuous reminder delivery without interruption.

🔄

RECEIVE_BOOT_COMPLETED

Restarts the reminder service after device reboot.

📍

ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION

Required for emergency GPS location sharing with family.

🗺️

ACCESS_BACKGROUND_LOCATION

Required for location sharing when the app is in background.

🎙️

RECORD_AUDIO

Required for the AI voice assistant interaction.

📷

CAMERA

Required for contact profile photos.

🔋

IGNORE_BATTERY_OPTIMIZATIONS

Required to ensure uninterrupted reminders 24/7.

⚠️

Important Disclaimer

Memora is a smart reminders and events system, not a medical device, and does not claim to provide a complete solution to memory problems. It may serve as a supportive aid in the very early stages of memory difficulties such as early dementia, but it is not a substitute for medical care or human supervision. The app is not error-proof: a user may mark a task as completed even if it was not actually performed. Please do not rely on it as a sole safety mechanism for vulnerable individuals.

Give Your Loved Ones Peace of Mind

Memora helps make sure important tasks and events are not forgotten, and gives your loved ones extra peace of mind.

Download Free on Google Play
